vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 17px;"><font style="font-size: 17px;">Notice that we don't have to import the&nbsp;<code style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 5px 2px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1em; font-family: Roboto; var(--whitegrey); border-radius: 3px; word-break: break-all;">@if</code>&nbsp;directive from&nbsp;<code style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 5px 2px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1em; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; background: var(--whitegrey); border-radius: 3px; word-break: break-all;">@angular/common</code>&nbsp;into our component templates anymore.</font></p><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px; font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 17px;"><font style="font-size: 17px;">This is because the&nbsp;<code style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 5px 2px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1em; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; background: var(--whitegrey); border-radius: 3px; word-break: break-all;">@if</code>&nbsp;syntax is part of the template engine itself, and it is&nbsp;<span style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-weight: 700; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline;">not</span>&nbsp;a directive.</font></p><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px; font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 17px;"><font style="font-size: 17px;">The new&nbsp;<code style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 5px 2px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1em; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; background: var(--whitegrey); border-radius: 3px; word-break: break-all;">@if</code>&nbsp;is built-in directly into the template engine, so it's automatically available everywhere.</font></p><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px; font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 17px;"><font style="font-size: 17px;">It's just like the&nbsp;<code style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 5px 2px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1em; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; background: var(--whitegrey); border-radius: 3px; word-break: break-all;">{{variable}}</code>&nbsp;interpolation syntax or the&nbsp;<code style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 5px 2px; border: 0px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1em; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; background: var(--whitegrey); border-radius: 3px; word-break: break-all;">i18n</code>&nbsp;syntax - you don't need to import anything in order to use it.</font></p>" div.span: is a new template syntax for conditionally rendering elements in Angular templates. It's a built-in control flow syntax that allows you to conditionally show or hide page elements depending on a logical boolean condition.

div.h2: Why don't we need to import @if?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 477px; margin-left: 1231px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

p.style: box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); font-size: 17px;
p.font: Notice that we don't have to import the @if directive from @angular/common into our component templates anymore.

p.style: box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); font-size: 17px;
p.font: This is because the @if syntax is part of the template engine itself, and it is not a directive.

p.style: box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); font-size: 17px;
p.font: The new @if is built-in directly into the template engine, so it's automatically available everywhere.

p.style: box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em; padding: 0px; border: 0px light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; vertical-align: baseline; min-width: 100%; text-align: start; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); font-size: 17px;
p.font: It's just like the {{variable}} interpolation syntax or the i18n syntax - you don't need to import anything in order to use it.

h2.style: box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0.8em 0px 0.4em; padding: 0px; border: 0px light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-variant-numeric: inherit; font-variant-east-asian: inherit; font-variant-alternates: inherit; font-variant-position: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: 1.25em; font-family: Roboto; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; font-size: 16px; vertical-align: baseline; text-rendering: optimizelegibility; min-width: 100%; color: light-dark(rgb(10, 11, 12), rgb(227, 228, 229)); text-align: start; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));

div.h2: Why is the new @if syntax better than ngIf?

https://app.diagrams.net/
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClientModule } from '@angular/common/http';
import { HttpCallService } from './http-call.service';
import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-root',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [HttpClientModule, CommonModule],
  templateUrl: "./app.component.html",
  providers: [HttpCallService],
})
export class AppComponent implements OnInit {
  data$: any;

  constructor(private httpCallService: HttpCallService) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
   this.data$ =  this.httpCallService.getData('posts')
  }
}
